Support employees cannot approve listings and cannot create listings.
Support employees may prepare draft notes for review but cannot publish listing changes.
Support employees cannot access audit logs.
Policy documents cannot be viewed across agency tenants.
=== PAGE BREAK ===
Document retention records for retrieval operations are kept for ninety days unless a legal hold applies.
Operational dashboards may summarize counts after retention expiry, but the underlying retained records still follow the ninety-day rule.
Inquiry retention records are kept for one hundred eighty days unless a dispute requires longer preservation.
Phone verification requires a confirmed code before a profile phone number is trusted for critical contact flows.
=== PAGE BREAK ===
Office opening hours are Monday to Friday from 09:00 to 18:00 Beirut time.
Reception may unlock the lobby slightly earlier for deliveries, but official office opening hours remain 09:00 to 18:00 Beirut time.
Shared team inboxes may be used only through the approved workspace mailbox and must not forward policy files externally.
If a policy conflicts with a listing detail, staff must follow policy and escalate the listing discrepancy to an agency admin.
=== PAGE BREAK ===
Policy updates must be approved by an agency admin and recorded with the effective date.
Minor wording corrections still require the same approval trail if they affect the policy text shown to staff.
Only agency admins may delete a policy document after replacement verification.
Another agency's policy must never be disclosed or cited in answers.
